_note: deploy_workshop now merges this workshop's spec.session.objects (Route-management Role + observe NetworkPolicy) into the portless deploy, so the SA CAN create the Route and the NetworkPolicy IS present on CRC — hence route-admitted and netpol-present are normal checks (no longer expect_fail). Only egress-blocked stays expect_fail: CRC has internet egress; the real air-gapped DCS platform blocks it.

steps.run: envsubst < hello-dcs.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=150s
